MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED). (AJR/ju)

For Reconsideration Of Ruling Denying New Trial; Declarations Of Carole L "Ruby" Rubin, And El St John;
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Susan A. Dovi, Esq. 703-4863 for Labor Commissioner and pltfs/respondents & opposing parties; El St. John, Esq. 378-6789 deft/applellant & moving party in pro per; Joel K. Belway, Esq. 455-5650 for deft Silver Cyber Tech, Inc. and former attorney for El St. John.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION DENIED - MOTION UNTIMELY. LETTER FROM CPA IS HEARSAY. NO DECLARATION OR SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS AS TO INCOME AND ASSETS). Order signed in open court. (AJR/JH)

For Reconsideration Or In The Alternative New Trial
Off Calendar Jul-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Susan A. Dovi, Esq. 703-4863 for Labor Commissioner and pltfs/respondents & opposing parties; El St. John, Esq. 378-6789 deft/applellant & moving party in pro per; Joel K. Belway, Esq. 455-5650 former attorney for El St. John (substitution of attorney filed this morning).
RULING: Argued and the Court denied the motion for reconsideration and motion for new trial. (AJR/JH)
